global.description: The ad features a modern design with a focus on promotional messaging and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting the NeonCast service with a focus on streaming and flexibility.

elements.label: Abstract shapes background
elements.description: A dark background featuring abstract shapes, including a large rectangle and a circle, creating a modern and minimalistic look.

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo with the text 'NeonCast' prominently displayed at the top, likely in a bright color against the dark background.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned towards the bottom left, adding a decorative touch to the overall design.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: A large, bold headline that reads 'Stream the hype' in a clear, modern font, positioned centrally on the ad.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom center with the text 'Learn more' in a contrasting color, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, bright badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold text, drawing attention to a promotional offer.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centrally positioned, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Stream the hype, Cancel anytime, NeonCast, Learn more, SALE
